---
title: "Project Sharknado"
subtitle: "Evaluating the Actuarial Risk of Coastal-Origin Tornadoes in the United States"
author: "Sophia Heinrich"
format: revealjs
---
<!-- To render: quarto render presentation.qmd -->

## Overview
- Introduction & Motivation
- Research Question
- 

## Introduction & Motivation

- 

## Methods
- Keep brief and interesting

## Results

## Action Items

## Thank you! Questions?
